mood: High energy, elite athleticism, command-center focus

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Dense and compact for the dashboard, using 'Control Room' grid.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-md (max 8px) for cards and buttons. Sharp edges.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Mobile-first, optical alignment, left-aligned data and forms.

headers.classes: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10 shadow-sm z-50 sticky top-0

buttons.primary: bg-[#007AFF] text-white hover:bg-[#3395FF] active:bg-[#005ECA] rounded-md font-bold transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-[#1F1F1F] text-white border border-[#27272A] hover:bg-[#27272A] rounded-md transition-colors

music_player_bar.classes: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-[#0A0A0A] border-t border-[#27272A] h-24 z-50 flex items-center px-6 gap-4

icons.weight: duotone for marketing, regular/bold for dashboard UI

hero_background.description: Neon-lit fitness studio background for the login/marketing page.

dj_mixing.description: Female DJ mixing music with neon lighting, perfect for 'Mixes' or 'Instructors' placeholder images.

dark_gym_class.description: People engaging in a workout class on red mats, used for Studio or Branch cards.

workout_bike.description: Row of stationary exercise bikes in a dark gym setting. Use as placeholder for high-BPM mix covers.

dj_headphones.description: DJ enjoying music with headphones in vibrant neon-lit setting. Use for 'Instructor' profile avatars.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the 'Performance Pro' dark theme archetype. Do not use pure white backgrounds anywhere.
Use the specific color hex codes provided for primary, accent, and backgrounds.
Implement a persistent global music player component fixed at the bottom of the viewport, styled like Spotify's web player but using our dark/volt blue palette.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
Do NOT use glassmorphism on dashboard cards or general UI; reserve it strictly for sticky headers/navs.
Use Manrope for body text and Outfit for headings. Install them via Google Fonts.
For mix items in the catalog, use a compact row or tight bento grid layout to maximize data density (Control Room Grid).
Do not use generic placeholder images. Rely exclusively on the media URLs provided in this JSON.
In the playlist creation view, use clear drag-and-drop affordances or intuitive '+' buttons with high contrast.
Include hover states (hover:-translate-y-1, border color change) for all interactive cards.
For the login/marketing view, use the hero_background image with a heavy black overlay (bg-black/60) to ensure text legibility.
Use Shadcn UI components extensively but strip away Vercel-like aesthetics (soft shadows, generic borders); apply the sharp, dark, 1px border styles defined here.
